name: Kentucky Machine & Engineering Inc.
notes: ISO 9001:2015 certified. Specializes in large capacity machining from 1 lb to 25 ton assemblies. 24/7 emergency services available. Founded in 1971.

name: Contract Machining & Manufacturing Co.
notes: ISO 9001:2015 certified. Founded in 1983. Serves automotive, heavy truck, HVAC, mining, and drilling industries. Specializes in rock drill tool manufacturing.

name: Walker Precision LLC
notes: Full service machine shop serving Central Kentucky. Specializes in racetrack conditioners and floats. Offers on-site welding services.

name: Royster's Production Machining
notes: AS9100 / ISO 9001 certified. Founded in 1998. Serves industries across nine states, Canada, and Mexico. Can turn components up to 36" diameter and mill parts up to 2,000 pounds.

name: Burdine-Anderson Inc.
notes: Founded in 1986. Serves aerospace, medical, military, and hermetics industries. Capabilities include machining aerospace alloys like Inconel, Kovar, Titanium, and Stainless Steel. Tolerances to +/- .0001.

name: Whelan Machine & Tool
notes: Veteran-owned small business founded in 1989. ISO 9001:2015, AS9100D, and ITAR certified. Specializes in mission-critical defense manufacturing. Quality lab with 2 FARO Arm CMMs and Zeiss Contura.

name: McCarty Fabrication
notes: Veteran-owned. Low overhead shop offering fast turnaround. Specializes in prototypes and small batches (10-50+ parts). Serves Kentucky, Tennessee, and nationwide.

name: Northern Kentucky Machine (NKM)
notes: Founded in 1989. Provides competitive pricing and quick turnaround times. Also listed at 131 Weber Lane, Florence KY.

name: Ace Machine Inc
notes: Precision machining shop specializing in rotating power transmission components.

name: Victor Enterprises Inc.
notes: AS9100D(2016) certified. Founded in 1974. 30-ton hoist capability. Two 6" horizontal spindle boring mills. Located in Coleman Road Industrial Park.

name: Xtek Precision Maintenance
notes: Formerly Precision Machine Inc. Over 50 years serving heavy industry. 30,000 sq. ft. facility with 27,000 sq. ft. machine shop and 3,000 sq. ft. fabrication shop.

name: South-Side Machine Shop Inc.
notes: CAD-CAM qualified. Short or long production runs available.

name: B&H Tool Works
notes: Founded in 1978. Specializes in Class A progressive dies. Tier 2 supplier to automotive manufacturers. 7 CNC mills, 2 CNC lathes, 10 wire EDM machines. Trumpf 6KW Fiber laser.

name: Precision Tube Inc.
notes: ISO 9001:2000 registered. Family-owned business approach. Offers CNC manufacturing of wire form products and tube fabricating.

name: Kentucky Machine and Tool Company
notes: Large wire EDM machine supports parts up to 2000 pounds. 3 Vertical Machining Centers with capacity up to 76" x 33". CNC Turning Centers with bar pulling capabilities. CMM quality assurance.

name: John Bouchard & Sons Co.
notes: Founded in 1900. Also has Evansville, Indiana location. Offers field service and shop repair for pumps, motors, blowers, gear boxes, and rotating equipment.

name: Cumberland Machinery Movers
notes: Founded in 2004. Full-service industrial millwright. Forklifts from 2,000 lbs to 130,000 lbs. Gantry systems to 600 tons. ANSI Z10 certified trainer.

name: C&H Machine
notes: Machine shop serving Kentucky.

name: Atlas Machine & Supply Inc.
notes: Established machine shop in Louisville.

name: Prince Precision Machining LLC
notes: Precision machining shop in Louisville.

name: Morehead Machining Inc.
notes: Machine shop serving Eastern Kentucky.

name: Roberson Machine Company
notes: Industry leader in custom CNC machining services. Offers turnkey solutions with custom finishes and wide range of materials.

name: RAM Tool Inc.
notes: Precision machining CNC shop serving Kentucky. Offers end-to-end solutions from component creation to delivery.

name: Distinctive Manufacturing Group
notes: Full-service CNC machining and fabrication. Robotic CNC machining cell for automation. 98% on-time delivery rate.

name: C. Thorrez Industries
notes: Provides CNC and production machining services through five cutting-edge facilities.
